Metadata.description: Software-Ingenieur, der moderne Webtechnologien, skalierbare Schnittstellen und KI-gesteuerte autonome Systeme entwickelt.

HomePage.title: I build products that scale.
HomePage.description: Full-stack engineer shipping Next.js apps, Supabase backends, and AI automations with n8n.

sections.projects_preview_desc: Leistungsorientierte und skalierbare digitale Produktarchitekturen für komplexe Geschäftsanforderungen.

AiLabPage.welcome: System bereit. Was möchten Sie analysieren?

chat.terminal_empty_desc: Ask anything about Next.js, Supabase, n8n integrations, or Berkay's projects.
chat.pdf_empty_desc: Upload a PDF, TXT or MD file — BEX reads the content and answers your questions.
chat.engineer_empty_desc: Ask about Next.js, Supabase, AI architecture, or Berkay's projects.
chat.placeholder_engineer: Ask an architecture or DevOps question...

chat.error_api_key: AI service is not configured on the server.
